candidates.why: Clearly labeled total revenue at top of income statement and matches definition of total revenue/sales.

candidates.row_label: Items that will not be reclassified to statement of income
candidates.why: OCI item, not revenue; rejected.
Financial income, not operating revenue; rejected.
Financial income, not operating revenue; rejected.
Financial/other income, not core revenue; rejected.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Earnings measure, not revenue; rejected.
Comprehensive income, not revenue; rejected.

candidates.row_label: Accrued revenues at the point in time
candidates.why: Balance sheet accrual, not revenue line item; rejected.
Likely includes direct labor costs; could also contain overhead but is a core operating cost; included as part of COGS approximation is debatable but materials lines better represent direct costs.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicitly SG&A, not COGS; rejected.
Classic direct cost of materials/inputs; strong COGS component.
Direct subcontracted production/service costs; appropriate COGS component.
Explicit direct material costs; appropriate COGS component.
Aggregated operating overhead; better treated as SG&A bucket, not pure COGS; rejected for COGS.
Operating overhead, not direct production cost; rejected.
Selling expense (SG&A), not COGS; rejected.
Likely SG&A/overhead; not specifically COGS; rejected.
Net operating result line, not a specific COGS component; rejected.
Financial, not operating; rejected.
Financial, not operating; rejected.
Non-operating, not COGS; rejected.
Balance sheet inventory account, not period expense; rejected for COGS line mapping.

variables.notes: Employee benefit expenses could contain both direct labor and overhead, but more clearly identifiable direct production costs are in the materials/subcontractors lines, which are selected.

candidates.why: This is income, not expense; excluded from SG&A components.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component and SBC should be included in SG&A.
Generic operating expense bucket that likely aggregates SG&A; suitable when no explicit SG&A total is given.
Typical SG&A/overhead bucket; should be included as SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization (D&A), which should be excluded from SG&A per instructions; rejected.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Most direct income-statement line tied to R&D; while it is amortization of capitalized R&D rather than current-period gross R&D expense, it is the closest explicit R&D-related expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental line detailing amortization of capitalized R&D; also an R&D-related expense component.
Balance sheet asset, not a period expense; rejected.
Balance sheet gross capitalized R&D, not the expense; rejected for XRD line mapping.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not current-period expense; rejected.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: These rows capture the amortization of capitalized R&D, which is the only explicit R&D-related expense disclosed. No separate current R&D expense line is visible in the preview.

candidates.why: Primary line for interest expense; best match for gross interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities is part of total interest expense; good secondary candidate if main Interest Expense is missing for some years.

candidates.row_label: Net interest cost of pension obligations
candidates.why: Interest component of pension cost; tertiary interest expense component if other interest lines are missing.
Represents allocation of net income, not interest; rejected.
Same as non-controlling interests; rejected.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; useful fallback if primary lease interest line is missing in some periods.
Derivative position, not interest expense; rejected.
Debt balance, not expense; rejected.
Debt balance, not expense; rejected.
Equity attributable to minorities, not interest; rejected.
Same as non-controlling interests; rejected.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Net interest cost of pension obligations
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list so later code can pick the first available interest expense measure per year.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not a balance sheet equity stock; rejected.
Also an income statement allocation (from OCI/total comprehensive income), not a balance sheet item; rejected.
Relates to investments in affiliates, not total shareholders' equity; rejected.
Includes both owners and non-controlling interests; acceptable only if no parent-only equity is available, but here a better owners-only line exists.
Balancing artifact, not a clean equity total; rejected.
Explicitly a balancing item, not a substantive account; rejected.
Balancing line, not true equity; rejected.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line; rejected.
Total of both, not equity alone; rejected.

final_choice.row_label: Capital and reserves attributable to owners of the company

variables.notes: REVIEWED. For BE we must exclude non-controlling interests. The balance sheet provides a specific line 'Capital and reserves attributable to owners of the company', which is the ideal parent/owners’ equity measure but is not in the candidate list. Using 'Total equity' from the candidates would double count MIB, since separate Non-controlling Interests lines exist. Therefore I selected the owners-only equity line from the full A-column and flagged this for manual review. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Capital and reserves attributable to owners of the company

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit to NCI, not balance sheet equity; for MIB denominator we prefer the balance sheet stock, so this is not selected.
Same as above, income statement share of profit; not ideal for equity denominator.
Balance sheet line for equity attributable to non-controlling interests; ideal for MIB.
Duplicate label for non-controlling interests over time; good secondary fallback.

variables.notes: Both balance sheet lines represent non-controlling equity at different times; provided as alternatives so later code can pick whichever is populated for a given year.
